cases.name: issue-like-minimal
cases.childPrompt: 1. TASK: Act as the fresh issue_worker for issue #9 on branch agent/issue-9-add-clear-completed-flow-to-the-todo-demo in /home/timmypai/apps/autodev-demo-todo. 2. EXPECTED OUTCOME: Produce a compact worker artifact at docs/agents/worker-results/issue-9.yaml with allowed status {success|blocked|failed}. 3. REQUIRED TOOLS: Read and bash only. 4. MUST DO: Read docs/agents/issue-packets/issue-9.yaml first and then stop after reporting status. 5. MUST NOT DO: Do not edit files. 6. CONTEXT: Minimal repro for issue worker startup.
